projectDescription: A collection of automated setup scripts and dotfiles for configuring a macOS development environment with tools for Python data analysis, cloud computing, web development, and more.
keyFeatures: One-command full macOS dev environment setup via .dots launcher
Modular scripts — install only the tools you need
Automated Homebrew installation of 50+ developer tools and apps
Python 2 & 3 virtualenv setup with data science libraries (NumPy, Pandas, Scikit-learn)
AWS, Spark, and Hadoop MapReduce environment configuration
Common data store installation (MySQL, PostgreSQL, MongoDB, Redis, Elasticsearch)
Android SDK and IntelliJ IDEA development environment
Curated dotfiles for Vim, Git, Bash, iTerm2, and Sublime Text
macOS developer-friendly system defaults via osx.sh
publicApiSurface: osxprep.sh (update macOS + install Xcode CLI tools)
brew.sh (install Homebrew formulae and cask apps)
pydata.sh (set up Python data science environments)
aws.sh (configure AWS CLI and Spark/Hadoop tools)
datastores.sh (install MySQL, PostgreSQL, MongoDB, Redis, Elasticsearch)
web.sh (install Node.js and npm global packages)
android.sh (install Java, Android SDK, Android Studio)
